mapper.select: /* SQL ID : LessonPageDAO.list 설 명 : */ SELECT A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , A.PAGE_SEQNO , A.ULD_GBNCD , A.PAGENM , A.URL , A.VDO_MNTS , A.ATNDC_RFLTYN , A.OYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_PAGE A WHERE A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = #{lessonCntsId}

/* SQL ID : LessonPageDAO.listLessonCntsForTrans 설 명 : 페이지 목록(선수강과목 이관용) */ SELECT A.* FROM SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_PAGE A, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS B WHERE 1=1 AND A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = B.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
